title: Operator-private evidence card export and atlas-safe previews
problem: Canonical evidence_card_v0.1.0 exists but has no export path, cluster reports lack top_evidence_cards, and atlas/frontend cannot consume a safe derived preview without widening export-public.
acceptance_criteria: export-evidence-cards CLI writes deterministic evidence_card_export_v0.1.0 JSON under data/exports/evidence_cards or --output-dir.
Cluster evidence packets include top_evidence_cards with evidence_card_v0.1.0 shape.
Atlas-safe previews omit quote/IDs and pass private-field key scan.
export-public allowlist unchanged; golden test 11 unaffected.
rollback_plan: Remove export-evidence-cards CLI and cluster top_evidence_cards field.
